title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies
abstract: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools oft...
abstract_zh: 特朗umpy政府一拍板，Anthropic就能向一些公司放送“神话”AI模型了！这可是精准打击，小众市场的大杀器。在瞬息万变的AI界，这种聚焦式的精确投放简直就像给那些特立独行的企业投了一颗重磅炸弹！
